A parte inferior esquerda mostra 'SO MOS', que parece ser parte de um elemento gráfico 'SOMOS' e não um slot de cromo.

page_summary: This two-page spread from the 'Road to FIFA World Cup 2026' album features the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team. It includes 20 sticker slots for players, an emblem, and a team photo, along with details on their Group H qualification matches and Group B friendly/tournament matches.

slots.label: Bosna i Hercegovina / Bosna i Hercegovina / Bosnien und Herzegowina / Bosna i Hercegovina / Bosnie et Herzégovine / Bosnia i Herzegovina / Bosnien und Herzegowina / Bosna i Hercegovina / Bosnien-Hersek / Bosna i Hercegovina

notes: The left page details 'Group H' qualification matches for Bosnia-Herzegovina against Portugal, Slovakia, Luxembourg, Iceland, and Liechtenstein, including a table with P, W, D, L, GF, GA, GD, PTS. It also lists play-off matches: WALES - BOSNIA-HERZEGOVINA and BOSNIA-HERZEGOVINA - ITALY. The right page features 'GROUP B' with flags for Qatar, Canada, Switzerland, and Bosnia-Herzegovina, listing matches: Canada - Bosnia-Herzegovina (Friday, 12 June - Toronto Stadium), Switzerland - Bosnia-Herzegovina (Thursday, 18 June - Los Angeles Stadium), and Qatar - Bosnia-Herzegovina (Wednesday, 24 June - Seattle Stadium).
